title: JourneyMap Icons
description: This Resource pack gives you 6 new icons for waypoints on JourneyMap
body:
This pack has 6 icons and will probably get more. This pack will give you vanilla icons for Journey Map.
___
**If you disable this pack while having the icons used your waypoints could corrupt but as soon as you reactivate the pack it will be fine.**
___

P.S. Give me ideas for icons in the comments
